items.title: Example Foundation pledges $1,000 to every newborn in Example County
items.excerpt: The foundation said the one-time gifts will flow into the new federal children's accounts starting this fall. (Demo item.)

items.title: Statewide 530A awareness campaign launches with employer match pilots
items.excerpt: Officials outlined plans to encourage employer contributions within the $2,500 cap. (Demo item.)
